name: Puzzle Game Starter
description: A grid-based puzzle game framework with match/swap mechanics, level progression, scoring system, and animated feedback. Includes a GridContainer-based game board, piece generation with color/shape variants, match detection algorithm, cascade/refill logic, and a level select screen.

projectStructure.project.godot: Project configuration — display: 720x1280 (portrait mode for mobile-friendly), stretch mode canvas_items, input map with click/touch actions

scenes/.main.tscn: Control root — manages screen transitions between menu, level select, and gameplay
scenes/.menu.tscn: Control — title Label, play Button, settings Button, high score display
scenes/.level_select.tscn: Control — ScrollContainer with GridContainer of level buttons, star ratings, lock states
scenes/.game_board.tscn: Control — GridContainer (configurable rows/cols), piece placeholder slots, score panel, moves counter, timer label
scenes/.piece.tscn: TextureRect — Sprite2D with color tint, AnimationPlayer (spawn_bounce, match_flash, destroy_shrink, fall_drop), click detection Area2D

scripts/.game_board.gd: extends Control — grid_size Vector2i(8,8), piece_types array, spawn_pieces() fills grid randomly, swap_pieces() animates swap with tween, check_matches() scans rows/cols for 3+ consecutive, remove_matches() triggers destroy animations, refill_board() drops existing pieces and spawns new ones, cascade loop until no matches remain
scripts/.piece.gd: extends TextureRect — piece_type enum (6 colors), grid_position Vector2i, is_matched flag, animations for spawn/match/destroy, input_event handles click for selection
scripts/.match_detector.gd: extends Node — scan_horizontal()/scan_vertical() find runs of 3+, detect_special_matches() for T/L shapes, returns array of matched positions
scripts/.score_manager.gd: extends Node (autoload) — points per match, combo multiplier, level targets, high score persistence with ConfigFile
scripts/.level_manager.gd: extends Node (autoload) — level definitions (grid size, target score, move limit, available piece types, special rules), star thresholds, unlock progression

assets/.placeholder_board_bg.png: Background texture for the game board area
assets/.placeholder_star.png: 24x24 star icon for level completion rating

preBuiltMechanics: Animated piece transitions (spawn, match, destroy, fall)
Level select screen with lock/unlock states
customizationPoints: Number and types of pieces (colors, shapes, themed objects)
Match rules (match-3, match-4 special pieces, match-5 bombs)
Level objectives (score target, clear specific pieces, timed)
Difficulty curve (fewer piece types = easier, more = harder)
Special power-ups (row clear, column clear, area blast)
Add obstacles (locked pieces, blockers, ice layers)
examplePrompts: Make a match-3 puzzle game like Candy Crush
Create a gem-matching puzzle with levels
Build a color-matching game for mobile
Design a puzzle game where I swap fruits to score points
